title: The Presidental (Emoluments) (Amendment) Act, 2011

sections.title: This Act may be cited as the Presidential Short title
sections.body:
This Act may be cited as the Presidential Short title
(Emoluments) (Amendment) Act, 2011, and shall be read
Cap. 261
as one with the Presidential (Emoluments) Act, in this Act
5 referred to as the principal Act.

sections.title: The principal Act is amended by the repeal of section Repeal and
sections.body:
The principal Act is amended by the repeal of section Repeal and
three and the substitution therefor of the following: replacement
of section 3

sections.title: (1) A person who has held the office of
sections.body:
(1) A person who has held the office of
Gratuity
President shall, upon the expiration of a term of office
10 or upon ceasing to be President, be paid a gratuity
equal to one hundred percent of the aggregate amount
of emoluments paid or payable to the person in respect
of the period spent in office.
(2) Where a person who holds office of President
15 ceases to hold office—
(a) by reason of death; or
(b) when a new President assumes office after
an election following the dissolution of Par-
liament before its full term;
20 that person shall be deemed to have served as President
for the purpose of this section.
N.A.B. 11, 2011
